118  return m_b_box;

GridType
Type of the grid.
Definition: RegularGrid.h:35
RegularGrid::ISOTROPE
@ ISOTROPE
Isotropic grid, equal delta along each axis.
Definition: RegularGrid.h:37
RegularGrid::BASIC
@ BASIC
Regular grid with the number of cells chosen by the user.
Definition: RegularGrid.h:36
RegularGrid::ANISOTROPE
@ ANISOTROPE
Anisotropic grid, equal number of cells along each axis.
